name: Rosewood Sand Hill
senseOfPlace: Oak woodland on Sand Hill Road — the modern clubhouse for Silicon Valley. Bici Coffee, the Roof at Madera, founder-frequented quiet. Not Mediterranean luxury; Northern California restraint.

amenityOptions.name: Heirloom Bartlett pears + Bay Area honey
amenityOptions.story: 30 min from property — orchard fruit that grew up under the same coastal fog

amenityOptions.name: Sonoma olive oil + buckwheat crackers
amenityOptions.story: California's first commercial olive oil; orchard tour available via Placemaker

amenityOptions.name: Tartine sourdough boule + cultured butter
amenityOptions.story: Stanford grad's bakery — the bread that started the Bay Area sourdough movement

amenityOptions.name: Cowgirl Creamery cheese flight
amenityOptions.story: Point Reyes cheesemakers; the Bay Area dairy revival in one tasting board

amenityOptions.name: Recchiuti chocolate truffles
amenityOptions.story: Michael Recchiuti's atelier; the chocolate that defined the city's pastry shift

amenityOptions.name: Equator Coffee — single-origin Bay Area roast
amenityOptions.story: Marin-based, direct-trade — the coffee Bici Coffee serves at the property

signatureExperiences.title: Private morning hike
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Windy Hill Preserve, 12 min — the oak woodland that defines Sand Hill

signatureExperiences.title: Pescatarian tasting at The Sea
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Echoes the register of Henry's at HK; quiet alcove available

signatureExperiences.title: Filoli Gardens private docent tour
signatureExperiences.whyHere: 1917 estate; English-garden contrast to the oak woodland

signatureExperiences.title: Anchor & Hope oyster bar, Half Moon Bay
Computer History Museum after-hours visit
signatureExperiences.whyHere: The actual Sense of Place — Silicon Valley as a museum subject

signatureExperiences.title: Sand Hill cycling loop with Bici provisions
signatureExperiences.whyHere: The bike-and-coffee local ritual; the property's own café provisions the ride
signatureExperiences.vendorOrPlace: Sand Hill Road loop · Bici Coffee at property

signatureExperiences.title: Cantor Arts Center private view, Stanford
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Rodin garden; Cantor's California modernism collection

signatureExperiences.title: Madera tasting menu, the property
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Michelin-starred; the on-property anchor for guests who want to stay close

placemakers.name: Maria Salvo
placemakers.bio: Third-generation Brentwood orchardist; sources Sand Hill's amenity programme.

placemakers.name: Daniel Sotomayor
placemakers.bio: Cantor Arts Center curator; walks Rosewood guests through Eichler and the Stanford architectural lineage.
